Leeds
Leeds & West Yorkshire

Professional Loft Insulation Services in Leeds

Yorkshire Insulations offers professional loft insulation services in Leeds, helping homeowners save energy and reduce their utility bills. Our expert team provides cavity wall insulation, solid wall insulation, room in roof insulation, and more across Leeds and the surrounding areas.

We know Leeds housing inside out - from Victorian back-to-backs in Headingley to 1960s semis in Morley and new builds in Seacroft. Get your free survey and quotation today.

17+ five-star reviews
Certified installers
Yorkshire-first advice

Get in touch

Leeds Housing

Insulation for Every Leeds Property Type

Leeds has one of the most varied housing stocks in Yorkshire. The right insulation depends on your property - its age, construction type, and how it was built. We work across all of them.

Victorian terraces

Pre-1919, solid brick walls, no cavity

  • Solid wall insulation
  • Loft insulation
  • Underfloor insulation

1930s - 1980s semis

Cavity walls, often unfilled

  • Cavity wall insulation
  • Loft insulation
  • Underfloor insulation

New builds

Post-2000 construction

  • Top-up loft insulation
  • Spray foam for gaps
  • Underfloor upgrades

Stone cottages

Rural & village properties

  • External wall insulation
  • Solid wall insulation
  • Loft insulation

Flats & apartments

Including converted properties

  • Loft / roof insulation
  • Cavity wall insulation
  • Spray foam solutions

1980s - 2000s estates

Mix of cavity and solid wall

  • Cavity wall insulation
  • Loft insulation
  • External wall insulation
Our Services in Leeds

What We Install in Leeds

We cover every major insulation type across the city and surrounding areas.

Loft Insulation

The fastest win for most Leeds homes. Most jobs done in a day. Save energy and reduce bills with professional loft insulation.

Cavity Wall Insulation

Ideal for the high volume of 1930-1980 semis and terraces across Leeds. Reduce heat loss through your walls.

Solid Wall Insulation

Essential for pre-1919 Leeds housing with no cavity to fill. Improve thermal efficiency of solid brick walls.

Room in Roof Insulation

Perfect for conversions and rooms in the roof. Maximise comfort in your attic space.

External Wall Insulation

For properties where internal or cavity solutions aren't viable. Enhance appearance and thermal performance.

Internal Wall Insulation

Internal wall insulation solutions for properties where external options aren't suitable.

Floor Insulation

Reduce heat loss through solid and suspended timber floors in your Leeds property.

Spray Foam Insulation

Fills every gap. Effective for older and irregular roof spaces.

Solar Panel Installation

Generate your own electricity and reduce energy bills with professional solar panel installation.

Boiler Installation

Energy-efficient boiler installation and replacement services across Leeds.

Areas Covered

Leeds Areas We Cover

We work across Leeds and the surrounding areas including:

We cover Leeds, Yorkshire, and surrounding regions - with practical recommendations based on the age, build type, and condition of your property. Not sure if we cover your area?

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Straight answers, clear expectations, and practical guidance for Leeds homeowners.

Many loft insulation jobs are completed within a single day. Larger projects such as external or solid wall insulation can take longer depending on the property and access.

Yorkshire Insulations

Based in Yorkshire and working across the region, our experienced team delivers loft insulation, cavity wall insulation, spray foam removal, underfloor insulation, and new build insulation.
